symbols: biomorphic white form — an organic, amoeba-like shape suggesting natural growth or bodily movement
yellow flat silhouette — a two-dimensional echo or shadow of the three-dimensional form in front
rounded protrusions — limb-like extensions evoking human or animal anatomy abstracted beyond recognition
description: A modern abstract sculpture consisting of two elements against a neutral beige background. In the foreground stands a three-dimensional white biomorphic form with smooth, rounded surfaces and four bulbous protrusions extending outward, resembling an abstracted cross or asterisk shape. Behind it, a flat yellow silhouette of a similar form leans against the wall, serving as a two-dimensional counterpart. The surfaces are clean and matte, the forms organic yet geometric in their symmetry.
